title: Verify every classification apply crash window
preconditions: A multi-item apply run and controllable termination points exist before and after preflight, LEDGER calls, and CLASSIFY result durability.
steps: Terminate at every boundary; restart; inspect status; replay or resume; compare Ledger allocation history and CLASSIFY item results.
expected: NFR-CLASSIFY-APPLY-RECOVERY reaches exact item resolution with no second category mutation and no skipped or falsely terminal item.
